title: How would I build authentication ("Connect") screen for my integration app?

posts.author: Severyn (Severyn Vehera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!

I am working on the integration application. I am puzzled how I can add an “Authentication screen” for my app similar to the Jira or GitHub integrations(see screenshot bellow) so that user can connect to my integration app.
I wasn’t able to find any documentation on how to add this screen if there is any please point me out.

Jira Authentication page1537×981 105 KB

Thanks,
Severyn

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Severyn !

Welcome to the community. I hope you like it here

You could use the Authorization URL to redirect the user to an endpoint on your server that directs users through your app’s auth flow. When a user adds your integration recipe, they will be redirected to this Authorization URL. They could enter the information you need in that view. Once the user enters the information, you can redirect them to the backToUrl to finish configuring the recipe.

Does this help? Let me know what you think!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
